## Safety and privacy

- [ ] No credentials, tokens, private keys, hidden system prompts, or unauthorized personal/proprietary data.
- [ ] Imported prompts, transcripts, fixtures, and outputs remain inert data.
- [ ] Public claims do not exceed public evidence.

## Remaining limitations

State what was not inspected, executed, reproduced, or independently verified.

## Disposition requested

- [ ] Review only
- [ ] Bounded repair requested
- [ ] Human-authorized canonical promotion requested

Checking the final box does not grant merge authority. The human must authorize promotion explicitly.
